name: Death
pages: Death is not the end in Tree Spirit. Indeed, since your soul is bound to your heart log, you will always respawn while it is present.

pages.text: When you die, a gravestone will appear, which holds all of your items. You will resume the challenge once you have broken your grave.

pages: The heart log knows when it is in danger. When you break your gravestone, a clone of you at the time of death will appear for a short while to help defend the tree.
